name: Commerce Layer
description: Commerce Layer — Headless commerce platform providing global multi-market pricing, inventory, and checkout via REST API.

seo.title: Commerce Layer — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Commerce Layer: Commerce Layer — Headless commerce platform providing global multi-market pricing, inventory, and checkout via REST API.

when_to_use: Multi-market pricing and inventory for global headless stores
Checkout API for custom storefronts with complex promotions
B2B and B2C commerce with per-market localized pricing
Composable commerce layer plugged into any frontend stack
Managing 100+ market configurations from a single API

review.verdict: A strong headless commerce API for global brands, not a shortcut for first-time merchants.
review.best_for: Multi-market DTC brands running composable, headless storefronts
review.not_for: Small merchants who need a full-stack store out of the box
